features.description: nudge_baseline_ttl_seconds (default 900) in DriftConfig lets users tune how long a baseline snapshot stays valid
features.motivation: Hardcoded 900s was too short for large repos and untunable; config field replaces persisted TTL on warm load so a change takes effect immediately

features.description: drift analyze --no-cache bypasses parse/signal caches for the current run; drift cache clear removes cache entries with optional --parse-only/--signal-only/--dry-run scoping
features.motivation: Allows users to force fresh analysis without deleting cache entries and to manually invalidate caches when fixtures or configs change

features.description: CI automatically updates the drift score badge in README.md on main-branch pushes
features.motivation: Keeps the public README badge in sync with the latest self-analysis score without manual intervention; ensures README always reflects current health

features.description: cohesion_deficit signal excludes private (_-prefixed) functions from semantic unit counting
features.motivation: Private helper functions extracted during refactoring were inflating the semantic unit count and causing false positives on cohesive modules; exclusion aligns with the intent of the signal (public API surface)

features.description: a2a_router now forwards target_path, max_findings, and strategy to scan() handler
features.motivation: A2A scan requests were silently dropping filtering and strategy parameters, causing full-repo scans when scoped or bounded scans were requested; fixing this makes A2A routing semantically equivalent to direct scan() calls
